What this is

A preview of a duplicate-ready Notion client tracker organized around the public workflow visible on the site.

Public workflow used

accepting new teams, players and coaches, U6 – U18 players both boys and girls, please email Fred Copeland, Unlock Your Potential with Soccer

Season ops snapshot Registration + roster board Family record Registration + volunteer view Season calendar + tryout window Season closeout + re-enrollment view Setup map

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • One row per player — age division (U6–U18), boys/girls, uniform size, parent contact, coach assigned
  • Inquiry inbox stops being two aol/msn accounts — every 'email Fred' lead lands on the board with a status
  • Registrar view Cheryl can actually hand off from, instead of re-building the roster from threaded replies

1. Season ops snapshot

Season ops snapshot

Active players by U-division, open inquiries still in Fred's inbox, coach slots still to fill, and uniform orders outstanding at a glance.

Open this view

2. Registration + roster board

Registration + roster board

Four-column board that mirrors the 'email Fred Copeland' intake: new inquiry → forms sent → registered + paid → rostered, tagged by age division (U6–U18) and boys/girls.

Open this view

3. Family record

Family record

One record per family with every player, age division, uniform size, season fees, and volunteer slot — one place instead of two inboxes.

Open this view

4. Registration + volunteer view

Registration + volunteer view

Focus view that pairs each player's registration stage with the parent-volunteer and coach slots claimed per age division, so the gaps are visible before the season starts.

Open this view

5. Season calendar + tryout window

Season calendar + tryout window

Fall and spring PCJSL seasons with tryout windows, coach confirmation deadlines, and game-start dates stacked on one timeline.

Open this view

6. Season closeout + re-enrollment view

Season closeout + re-enrollment view

After Nov 15 / May 17 the board becomes a re-enrollment list: age-ups to the next U-division, returning-coach confirmations, and spring-registration email queue.

Open this view

7. Setup map

Setup map

What you get on day one — board, family records, PCJSL calendar, coach-slot tracker, closeout view, and a one-click duplicate for next season.
